mcqs.question: What is the time complexity of Breadth-First Search (BFS)?
mcqs.explanation: The time complexity of BFS is O(b^d), where b is the branching factor and d is the depth of the search space.

mcqs.question: What is the space complexity of Depth-First Search (DFS)?
mcqs.explanation: The space complexity of DFS is O(d), where d is the depth of the search space.

mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of using an informed search strategy?
mcqs.explanation: The main advantage of using an informed search strategy is that it is more efficient, as it uses additional information about the problem to guide the search.

mcqs.question: What is the main disadvantage of using an uninformed search strategy?

options.text: It is more complex to implement

mcqs.explanation: The main disadvantage of using an uninformed search strategy is that it is less efficient, as it does not use any additional information about the problem to guide the search.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of using a heuristic function in an informed search strategy?

options.text: To guide the search towards the goal state
To avoid getting stuck in an infinite loop
To increase the flexibility of the search

mcqs.explanation: The purpose of using a heuristic function in an informed search strategy is to guide the search towards the goal state, by estimating the distance from the current state to the goal state.
